title: Baked Sea Bass with Egyptian Spices
description: A flavorful and healthy sea bass recipe with a blend of Egyptian spices, perfect for a dinner meal.
instructions: Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
Season the sea bass fillets with Monsoon salt and Egyptian spice blend.
Dip each fillet in the Bake breadcrumbs, pressing gently to adhere.
Heat the Jammy olive oil in a skillet over medium-high heat.
Sear the coated sea bass fillets in the skillet for 2-3 minutes on each side.
Transfer the fillets to the prepared baking sheet.
Bake in the preheated oven for 8-10 minutes or until cooked through.
Garnish with fresh parsley before serving.
